prompts.text: I reviewed the draft and left comments on the sections that need clarification.
We did it! The launch worked, traffic is stable, and users are signing up faster than expected!
I know this is difficult, and I am sorry we could not keep the original plan.
Keep your voice low for a moment, they are still in the room next door.
Stop right there. This is the final warning, and we are not repeating it again.

models.command: python3 scripts/runners/qwen3_tts_runner.py --device auto --model-id Qwen/Qwen3-TTS-12Hz-0.6B-Base --reference-text "This short sample is only for cloning my voice." --text "{text}" --reference-clip "{reference_clip}" --output-wav "{output_wav}"

python3 scripts/runners/dia_runner.py --device auto --model-id nari-labs/Dia-1.6B-0626 --reference-text "[S1] This short sample is only for cloning my voice." --text "[S1] {text}" --reference-clip "{reference_clip}" --output-wav "{output_wav}"
